channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: ASIC probes big four accounting firms' handling of internal complaints after KPMG data misuse scandal
item.description: The Australian Securities and Investments Commission (ASIC) has launched an investigation into how the Big Four accounting firms—KPMG, Deloitte, EY, and PwC—manage internal complaints, marking an unpr...

item.title: De La Salle Lipa Suspends Face-to-Face Classes for One Week Following Reported Security Threat
item.description: De La Salle Lipa in Batangas temporarily shifted all classes to online learning from July 6 to 11 after an alleged mass shooting threat circulated on social media. According to reports, parents receiv...

item.title: Trump Seeks Supreme Court Rehearing on Birthright Citizenship Ruling
item.description: President Donald Trump has demanded that the U.S. Supreme Court reconsider its 2025 ruling upholding birthright citizenship for children of undocumented immigrants, a decision the justices have never ...

item.title: India's indigenous 19-seater Saras MkII light transport aircraft design completes, minister hails as aviation milestone
item.description: The Council of Scientific and Industrial Research - National Aerospace Laboratories (CSIR-NAL) has successfully completed the design phase for the indigenous 19-seater Saras MkII light transport aircr...

item.title: Justin Bieber and Global Artists to Perform at World Cup Final Halftime Show
item.description: FIFA has announced that Justin Bieber will headline the World Cup final halftime show, joining fellow performers Madonna, Shakira, and BTS. The 11-minute performance, curated by Coldplay’s Chris Marti...

item.title: How to Maximize Earnings from Apple Gift Cards in Nigeria 2026
item.description: This article explains how Nigerians can convert Apple Gift Cards into Naira by understanding current exchange rates and market trends. It highlights that the value of these cards fluctuates based on f...

item.title: Over 50,000 Immigrants Repatriated from South Africa Amid Xenophobia Crisis
item.description: Over 50,000 immigrants have fled South Africa since xenophobic violence erupted last month, according to the Border Management Authority. Most have passed through a temporary repatriation center near ...

item.title: Aunty Ruth Simms: 50 Years of Educating and Inspiring Indigenous Students in NSW
item.description: Aunty Ruth Simms, the longest-serving Aboriginal Education Officer in New South Wales, has dedicated 50 years to transforming lives through education. Born and raised on La Perouse Reserve, she recall...

item.title: US-Iran Conflict Escalates Amid New Attacks and Ceasefire Tensions
item.description: The article details the escalating conflict between the US and Iran following new attacks by Tehran on US military sites in Bahrain and Kuwait. US President Donald Trump declared the interim agreement...

item.title: Kylian Mbappé's Dominance and Cultural Impact at the 2026 World Cup
item.description: Kylian Mbappé has emerged as the central figure of the 2026 World Cup, blending exceptional footballing skills with a unique cultural presence. The article explores his journey from a young prodigy in...

item.title: Sinaloa Cartel Leader Charged with Narco-Terrorism in Southern California
item.description: Federal prosecutors have charged Carlos Alberto Paez Pereda, a 30-year-old alleged high-ranking lieutenant of the Sinaloa Cartel's violent wing 'Los Rugrats,' with narco-terrorism, material support of...

item.title: Bishnoi gang's expanding presence in Canada raises concerns over organized crime, foreign interference and immigration enforcement
item.description: The article examines the growing presence of the Lawrence Bishnoi gang in Canada and its alleged involvement in organized crime, extortion, targeted violence and foreign interference. It begins with t...

item.title: South African Hospitals Prepare for Potential Ebola Outbreak
item.description: The South African health department has confirmed that hospitals across the country are prepared to handle potential Ebola cases, following concerns over the ongoing outbreak in the Democratic Republi...

item.title: Tanzania's Pyrethrum Production Targeted for 9,000 Tonnes by 2031
item.description: Tanzania has launched a five-year strategy to boost pyrethrum production from 3,800 tonnes to 9,000 tonnes by 2031. The plan aims to triple cultivation area from 4,232 hectares to 11,696 hectares, wit...

item.title: Chelsea Signs 19-Year-Old Winger Geovany Quenda from Sporting Lisbon
item.description: Chelsea Football Club has officially confirmed the signing of Portuguese teenager Geovany Quenda from Sporting Lisbon on a long-term deal until 2034. The 19-year-old winger, who's been hailed as one o...

item.title: U.S. Conducts Strikes on Iran Amid Escalating Tensions Following Trump's Ceasefire Declaration
item.description: The U.S. has launched additional strikes on Iran following President Trump's announcement that the ceasefire agreement is no longer in effect. The conflict, which has seen repeated military actions, h...

item.title: West Virginia Town Disbands Police Department After Chief Resigns and Alleged Evidence Room Break-In
item.description: A small town in West Virginia, Barrackville, has faced significant turmoil after its entire police department was abruptly relieved of duty following the resignation of its chief, Zachary Freeburn. Th...

item.title: Ekurhuleni Officials Face Arrest Over Corruption Allegations
item.description: Former Ekurhuleni city manager Imogen Mashazi has been instructed to present herself to police as part of an investigation into corruption and malfeasance within the municipality. This follows the arr...

item.title: Monsoon Disasters: Floods, Building Collapses, and Landslides Across India
item.description: Heavy monsoon rains have wreaked havoc across India, causing widespread flooding, landslides, and infrastructure damage. In Mumbai and Delhi, waterlogging disrupted transportation, with roads submerge...

item.title: Sara Duterte's Remarks on Assassination Impeachable Without Contract, Says House Prosecutor
item.description: The House prosecution panel has asserted that Vice President Sara Duterte's remarks about arranging for a hitman to kill President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. and his family, even without a physical contract...
